children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation to execute
children.behavior: Check command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'; return parsed command type

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns 'place' for input 'place'
Returns 'cancel' for input 'cancel'
Returns 'track' for input 'track'
Raises ValueError for invalid command

children.stop_reason: Simple validation logic, no further decomposition needed

children.name: ValidateOrderData
children.purpose: Validate order_data structure and required fields based on command type
children.behavior: Check required fields exist and have correct types; for 'place' ensure items list non-empty; for 'cancel' and 'track' ensure order_id present
children.signature: def ValidateOrderData(command_type: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

constraints.description: For 'place', order_data must contain 'items' as non-empty list
For 'cancel' and 'track', order_data must contain 'order_id' as string

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns validated_data dict for valid input
Raises ValueError for missing required fields
Raises ValueError for empty items list in 'place'

children.stop_reason: Simple validation logic, no further decomposition needed

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' order workflow: validate inventory, charge payment, reserve stock, create order, send notification
children.behavior: Check item availability and stock, charge payment via payment gateway, reserve inventory, create order record, send confirmation notification; rollback on failure
children.signature: def PlaceOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Order database for creating and updating order records
Inventory database for checking and reserving stock
Payment records for charging and tracking payments

data_operations.description: Create new order record, update status
Read stock levels, decrement reserved count

constraints.description: Must check inventory availability before charging payment
Must charge payment before reserving inventory
Must rollback all changes on any failure

acceptance_criteria.description: Creates order record in orders database
Charges payment and creates payment record
Reserves inventory by decrementing stock count
Returns success result with order_id on success
Rolls back all changes on failure and returns error

children.stop_reason: Complex workflow requiring multiple data store interactions

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status
children.behavior: Lookup order, check status not shipped, refund payment, restore reserved inventory, update order status to cancelled; rollback on failure
children.signature: def CancelOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Order database for reading and updating order status
Inventory database for restoring reserved stock

data_operations.description: Read order details, update status to cancelled

constraints.description: Must verify order exists and is not shipped before cancelling
Must refund payment before restoring inventory
Must rollback all changes on any failure

acceptance_criteria.description: Updates order status to cancelled in orders database
Refunds payment and updates payment record
Restores inventory by incrementing stock count
Returns success result on success
Returns error if order is already shipped
Rolls back all changes on failure

children.stop_reason: Complex workflow requiring multiple data store interactions

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' order workflow: return current order status and estimated delivery time
children.behavior: Lookup order by order_id, retrieve status and estimated delivery, return result
children.signature: def TrackOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Order database for reading order status and delivery info

data_operations.description: Read order record to get status and estimated delivery

constraints.description: Must not modify any data stores

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns order status and estimated delivery time for valid order_id
Returns error if order_id not found

children.stop_reason: Simple read-only query, no further decomposition needed

children.name: FormatResult
children.purpose: Format the operation result into the standard output JSON structure
children.behavior: Take success, order_id, status, message from child operation and construct final output dict

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns dict with 'success', 'order_id', 'status', 'message' keys
Preserves all fields from input operation_result

children.stop_reason: Simple formatting logic, no further decomposition needed

governance_notes: Global variables are scoped per child as subsets of parent globals. PlaceOrder and CancelOrder require read_write access to orders, inventory, and payments databases. TrackOrder requires only read access to orders. ParseCommand, ValidateOrderData, and FormatResult are pure functions with no data store access. Each child's global_vars is a strict subset of the parent's global_vars.
